title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 29 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 29 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 29 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 29/01/2026
decline of 0.70% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, spot prices fell by 3-5 RMB compared to the prior Today,the DCE iron ore futures market trended upwards amidst volatility. The benchmark contract, I2605, closed at 798.5 RMB/tonne, recording a 1.78% increase from the previous trading day.
